CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-30-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF GARY CRANE'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEPOSITION OF THE DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT HAS FAILED ENTIRELY TO ENGAGE IN ANY MEET AND CONFER PROCESS REGARDING RESCHEDULING THE DEPOSITION, AND HAS WILLFULLY FAILED TO COMPLY WITH HIS OBLIGATIONS TO APPEAR. PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER REPEATING VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING IN COMPLIANCE TWITH CRC 3.1312 DIRECTLY BY EMAIL TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM AT JULIA@CAMPINSBENHAMBAKER.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: JULIA CAMPINS, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-19-2019 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-20-2019 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-30-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deposition Of The Defendant; Memorandum Of Points & Authorities; Declaration Of John P. Hallissy
Off Calendar Apr-15-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF GARY CRANE's Motion To Compel Deposition Of The Defendant.

Plaintiff's Motion is granted. Defendant has failed entirely to engage in any meet and confer process regarding rescheduling the deposition, and has willfully failed to comply with his obligations to appear.

Prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling in compliance twith CRC 3.1312 directly by email to the Judge Pro Tem at julia@campinsbenhambaker.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Julia Campins, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
